1770100.name: The Steps of Divynia
1770100.description: Clash with tainted beasts and unveil mystical wonders as parts of Divynia change from the mundane into the unknown. As Aylidia, forge your destiny in a tale about courage and holding on to your beliefs. Explore enchanted forests, caverns trapped between two realms, and sacred ruins in pursuit of unraveling magic's secret. Will you unearth its greatest question? Or are some mysteries better left untouched? Find your answer in this epic Storybook-2D Adventure.
1770100.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
